name: Haitian French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ends off the bread and reserve them. Cut the remaining loaf into 1 1/2 inch thick slices and let stand uncovered for 4 hours to overnight.
2. In a 9x13-inch pan, combine orange juice, cream, eggs, cinnamon, sugar, and nutmeg. Whisk until well blended.
3. Lay the bread slices in the pan. Turn several times until all liquid is absorbed, about 3-5 minutes.
4. Melt butter in a 12x14-inch frying pan over medium heat.
5. Place the soaked bread into the frying pan. Cook, turning as needed, until richly browned on both sides (about 5 minutes).
6. Dust with powdered sugar. Serve and enjoy 4-8 servings.
